groups.title: Formatting & Bullet Style
examples: "Planned and delivered community programs engaging 500+ youth across multiple Victorian suburbs, supporting leadership development, engagement, and wellbeing initiatives"
groups.recommendation: Telegraphic bullets: action verb + object, no trailing period, no "I". Consistent past tense for previous roles, present for current. This maximises ATS compatibility and recruiter scan speed.

recommended_overrides.tense_consistency: Past tense for all roles except current position

groups.title: Linguistic Strength
examples: "Led the Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference, facilitating structured dialogue between youth and community elders on mental health and community issues, achieving 50+ attendees and 4.5/5 satisfaction rating"
groups.recommendation: High-impact action verbs (Spearheaded, Architected, Delivered) over passive constructions. Concise phrasing — remove filler words. Bold key metrics: **30% cost reduction**, **$2M pipeline**.

recommended_overrides.action_verb_intensity: Use assertive action verbs — avoid passive voice and weak constructions
recommended_overrides.bold_achievements: Bold numeric metrics and key results in work history bullets

groups.title: Structural & Visual Density
groups.finding: avg bullet length 19 words (target: under 18); 1 verbose phrasing issue(s) flagged
examples: "Led the Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference, facilitating structured dialogue between youth and community elders on mental health and community issues, achieving 50+ attendees and 4.5/5 satisfaction rating"
groups.recommendation: Curated 1–2 page CV with bullets under 18 words. Cut filler: "responsible for", "helped to", "assisted with". Recruiters spend ~6 seconds on initial scan — density matters.

recommended_overrides.cv_density: Keep CV to 2 pages max — cut verbose phrasing and redundant responsibilities
recommended_overrides.improve_conciseness: Refine long bullets (over 18 words) for scan-speed readability

groups.title: Cover Letter Style
groups.finding: 3 style issue(s) in cover letter: Header line contains non-standard separator characters that can break ATS/contact parsing.; Hyphenated compound adjective contains spacing error.; Hyphenated time expression contains spacing error.
groups.recommendation: Impact-driven opening: lead with a specific achievement or insight, not "I am writing to apply…". Modern sign-off: "Best regards" or "Kind regards" over "Yours sincerely".

recommended_overrides.cl_hook_style: Impact-driven opening — lead with a specific achievement, not a generic application statement
